name: exec

Item.desc: the argument passed to the script through the [[Magic_Variables#this|_this]] variable. To pass multiple arguments, use an [[Array]].
Item.name: argument

Item.desc:
the file path to the script. It should be given relatively to the mission folder, campaign scripts subfolder or global scripts folder and is searched there in the same order.
If you refer to a script packed together with an addon, the path should look like this: "\ADDON_PBO_NAME\script.sqs" where ADDON_PBO_NAME is the name of the addon's [[PBO]] file without extension.
Item.name: script
